# API and source catalog

The installed TypeScript declarations are the source of truth. The links below are navigation aids for the official dev documentation and source.

## High-use classes

| Area | Classes |
|---|---|
| Entry and factories | `VexFlow`, `Factory`, `EasyScore`, `System` |
| Rendering | `Renderer`, `RenderContext`, `SVGContext`, `CanvasContext` |
| Staff and layout | `Stave`, `Voice`, `Formatter`, `TickContext`, `ModifierContext` |
| Rhythm | `StaveNote`, `Beam`, `Tuplet`, `Dot`, `GhostNote`, `BarNote`, `RepeatNote` |
| Modifiers | `Accidental`, `Annotation`, `Articulation`, `Ornament`, `Tremolo` |
| Tablature | `TabStave`, `TabNote`, `TabSlide`, `TabTie` |
